name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents with QA Executor v9 (architectural restructure: 487-line core agent + qa-test-patterns skill + qa-gates skill, independent Strategist gate audit with 12 gates, 13 sequential phases, 80/90 budget, signal-to-pattern architecture, blocker-first discovery, interaction-level coverage). QA Strategist with 3 modes (Strategy, Gate Audit, Post-Execution Audit). 11 agent roles: Launch Pad, Supervisor v4, Execute Manager, Context-Keeper, Worker, Product Owner, Orchestrator, Code Reviewer (LSP, effort:high, permissionMode:plan, schema v2), Red Team Reviewer, QA Strategist, QA Executor. 46 reusable skills (including qa-test-patterns, qa-gates). Structured result schemas, failure escalation, architecture contracts, 6 quality gate hooks, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
